description: User describes both trauma symptoms and clearly named depressive patterns as related-but-distinct concerns. Should recommend both trauma and depression paths with grounded rationales — the user explicitly draws the distinction themselves.

rationaleMustReference: pleasure OR enjoy OR enjoyment OR happy
flinch OR raised voice OR dreams
expectedQualities.notes: Multi-signal test. User explicitly draws a distinction between the trauma response and the depression-shaped heaviness. Ideal: both paths returned with rationales tied to specific intake content. Acceptable: one of the two with strong rationale. Not acceptable: autism/adhd recommendations, or crisis flag.

payload.intakeText: I came out of a really bad relationship a few years ago. I still flinch when someone raises their voice and I have dreams about it. But what feels different and bigger now is that I do not enjoy anything anymore. I stopped doing the things I used to love. I cannot remember the last time I felt genuinely happy. It feels like its own separate thing on top of everything else.
